After graduating from Malmö Borgarskola's Internation Baccalaureate Career Related Programme (Handels-och Administrationsprogrammet), I later moved to Växjö to persue my Bachelors of Fine Art with a specialization in Visual Communication where I use Visual Communication as a change agent to create a strong foundation in sustainablility -- whether ecological, political, or social where I aim to foster meaningful and responsible design practices.
